name: Crab Custard with Lemon Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: Broccoli - 1 bunch, medium, cut into small florets
Crab meat - 1/2 lb, fresh or frozen, trimmed of cartilage
Salt and ground white pepper - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked crab meat, eggs, whipping cream, milk, salt, ground white pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Mix gently until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped broccoli florets.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
6. Place the dish in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
9. Serve warm, garnished with lemon butter sauce if desired.
